# IWindowControl.SetRect method

Move/resize the window (size honoured only for [`Resizable`](../../Stellar.Abstractions.Domain/WindowSpec/Resizable.md) windows). The new rect is persisted by the framework. Used by plugins that remember their own per-mode geometry.

```csharp
public void SetRect(WindowRect rect)
```
